phase_target: Phase 1 末尾 (Wave 4 / Group D Drift fix)

summary.notes: 本 Group は全 Wave 1-3 (Group A/B/C) 完了後の Wave 4 で実行。`depends_on` には wildcard 表現でなく Group A/B/C tickets を個別列挙する代わりに上位コーディネータが `wave: 4` をブロックして直列化する。

tasks.title: Entity table_name rename + spec alignment (E-008 Skill / E-021 ArtifactVersion / E-012 Phase): drift summary high 9 件のうち rename 系 3 件を batch 化
tasks.label: REFACTOR

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The migration shall ensure that the 3 affected entities (E-008 Skill, E-021 ArtifactVersion, E-012 Phase) have a single canonical table_name reflected in both supabase/migrations and entities.json spec_table_name fields.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the migration is applied to a fresh database, all 3 tables (skill_definitions, artifact_events, bf_phases) shall exist with the exact column set defined in entities.json fields[].

EVENT-DRIVEN: When the migration is applied on an existing v1 database where the legacy table name still exists, the system shall perform `ALTER TABLE ... RENAME TO ...` (not DROP+CREATE) so that data is preserved.

UNWANTED: If a foreign-key constraint references the legacy table name after rename, the migration shall not commit and shall raise a relation-not-found error to force the operator to add FK cascade renames.
UNWANTED: If `python3 scripts/verify-rls-coverage.py` reports a missing RLS policy for any of the renamed tables, the regression gate shall fail.
regression: The system shall pass `pytest backend/tests/migrations/test_entity_rename_alignment.py -v` with 0 failures.
The system shall pass `alembic upgrade head` and `alembic downgrade -1` in dry-run for migration 20260516120000.
The system shall pass `pyright --strict backend/app/models/` with 0 errors.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/lint-mock.sh` with 19/19 rules OK (entity-table-naming rule #19 must be green).
The system shall pass `python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py --check-file docs/task-decomposition/2026-05-16_v3_phase1/tickets-group-d-drift.json` for entry T-V3-D-01.
The system shall pass `python3 scripts/verify-rls-coverage.py` for the 3 affected tables.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/audit-md-check.sh T-V3-D-01`.

risk_flags: breaking_change: ALTER TABLE rename on production

EVENT-DRIVEN: When ADR-014 chooses `keep bf_ prefix as final` (current de-facto state), the system shall update entities.json E-014/15/16/17 spec_table_name to match impl_table (bf_tasks etc.) and shall not rename any DB table.

OPTIONAL: Where ADR-014 chooses `strip bf_ prefix`, the system shall enqueue a follow-up task T-V3-J-* (Polish phase) for migration with FK cascade and shall not perform the rename within this Phase 1 末尾 task.
UNWANTED: If lint rule #19 (entity-table-naming) continues to flag the 4 bf_ tables as drift after ADR-014 decision, the regression gate shall fail.

tasks.title: Entity type/enum drift fix (E-002 Account / E-003 AccountMember / E-004 Workspace / E-005 WorkspaceMember / E-020 Artifact / E-025 Session): enum/PK width 6 件 batch
tasks.label: REFACTOR

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The migration shall align 6 entity table column types with entities.json spec (Account.plan ENUM(free,pro,team,enterprise) / AccountMember.role ENUM / Workspace.is_confidential boolean + slug text UNIQUE / WorkspaceMember.role ENUM / Artifact.type ENUM / Session.status ENUM 7 values).
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the migration is applied, all 6 tables shall have CHECK constraints (or pgsql ENUM) for the listed enum columns matching the entity spec exactly.
UNWANTED: If existing row data violates the new constraint (e.g. legacy account.plan = 'unknown'), the migration shall raise and the operator must remediate before re-running.
UNWANTED: If the PK width drift (BIGSERIAL → uuid v7) cannot be applied non-destructively, the system shall enqueue a follow-up Polish-phase task instead of forcing destructive rewrite.
regression: The system shall pass `pytest backend/tests/migrations/test_enum_pk_alignment.py -v` with 0 failures.
The system shall pass `pyright --strict backend/app/models/` with 0 errors.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/lint-mock.sh` 19/19 OK.

tasks.title: Twin tables ARCHIVE batch (E-014 legacy tasks / E-007 ai_employee_config / E-027 pull_requests / E-032 repos): 二重実装 4 件解消
tasks.label: ARCHIVE

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The migration shall mark 4 legacy tables (tasks, ai_employee_config, pull_requests, repos) as ARCHIVE by renaming them to `_archived_<name>` (not DROP) so that audit history is preserved.

EVENT-DRIVEN: When a query references one of the 4 legacy tables via the deleted router/model paths, the system shall return HTTP 410 Gone via the modern equivalent endpoint (bf_tasks / ai_employees / prs / github_repos).
EVENT-DRIVEN: When `bash scripts/lint-mock.sh` rule #3 (archive-residue) runs, the system shall find 0 residue (the 4 legacy router files and model directory are fully removed from source).
UNWANTED: If any active foreign key still references the 4 legacy tables, the migration shall raise relation-error and shall not commit until all FKs are remapped.
regression: The system shall pass `pytest backend/tests/migrations/test_archive_legacy_twins.py -v` with 0 failures.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/lint-mock.sh` rule #3 (archive-residue) with 0 residue.
The system shall pass `python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py --check-file docs/task-decomposition/2026-05-16_v3_phase1/tickets-group-d-drift.json` for entry T-V3-D-04.

tasks.title: API method mismatch fix batch — 5 endpoints (PUT vs PATCH 統一 / GET vs POST 統一)
tasks.label: FIX
files_changed: backend/routers/accounts.py (modify: add PUT alias for PATCH /api/accounts/{id})
backend/routers/workspaces.py (modify: add PUT alias for PATCH /api/workspaces/{id}; add GET /api/workspaces/{id}/invitations)
backend/routers/ai_employees.py (modify: add PUT alias for PATCH /api/ai-employees/{id})
backend/routers/tasks.py (modify: add PUT alias for PATCH /api/tasks/{id})

functional: UBIQUITOUS: The backend shall accept both PUT and PATCH for /api/accounts/{id}, /api/workspaces/{id}, /api/ai-employees/{id}, /api/tasks/{id} returning the same handler result.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the mock issues `PUT /api/accounts/{id}` with a valid body, the backend shall return 200 with the updated resource (matching prior PATCH semantics).
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the mock issues `GET /api/workspaces/{id}/invitations`, the backend shall return 200 with the list of pending invitations.

OPTIONAL: Where the policy chooses to standardize on PATCH (REST convention), ADR-016 shall record this decision and shall enqueue a future deprecation task to remove the PUT alias after frontend migrates.

UNWANTED: If any of the 5 mock-declared endpoints (PUT /accounts/{id}, PUT /workspaces/{id}, PUT /ai-employees/{id}, PUT /tasks/{id}, GET /workspaces/{id}/invitations) returns 404 or 405, the regression gate shall fail.
regression: The system shall pass `pytest backend/tests/integration/test_api_method_alignment.py -v` with 0 failures (5 endpoints × happy path + 5 × unauthorized = 10 cases minimum).
The system shall pass `pyright --strict backend/routers/` with 0 errors.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/lint-mock.sh` rule #18 (screens-API) with 0 mock-impl mismatch for the 5 endpoints.
The system shall pass `python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py --check-file docs/task-decomposition/2026-05-16_v3_phase1/tickets-group-d-drift.json` for entry T-V3-D-09.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/audit-md-check.sh T-V3-D-09`.

tasks.title: API high non-method drift (2 endpoints: POST /api/me/api-tokens / POST /api/workspaces/{id}/exports) と medium 1 件 (GET /api/design-system/tokens)
tasks.label: FIX

functional: EVENT-DRIVEN: When the mock issues `POST /api/me/api-tokens` with a valid scope, the backend shall return 201 with `{ token: <opaque>, expires_at: <iso> }` and shall record the token hash (never the plaintext) in api_keys table.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the mock issues `POST /api/workspaces/{id}/exports` with `kind: 'spec_pdf' | 'delivery_report'`, the backend shall enqueue an export job and return 202 with `{ job_id: <uuid> }`.

EVENT-DRIVEN: When the mock issues `GET /api/design-system/tokens`, the backend shall return the design token catalog (color / typography / spacing / icons) sourced from docs/mocks/2026-05-09_v1/design-tokens.md.
UNWANTED: If `POST /api/me/api-tokens` ever returns the plaintext token a second time after creation (i.e. it must be display-once), the regression gate shall fail.
UNWANTED: If `POST /api/workspaces/{id}/exports` is called without workspace membership, the backend shall return 403.
regression: The system shall pass `pytest backend/tests/integration/test_api_token_endpoint.py backend/tests/integration/test_workspace_exports.py backend/tests/integration/test_design_system_tokens.py -v` with 0 failures.
The system shall pass `pyright --strict backend/routers/me_api_tokens.py backend/routers/workspace_exports.py backend/routers/design_system.py` with 0 errors.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/lint-mock.sh` rule #18 (screens-API) with 0 mismatch for these 3 endpoints.
The system shall pass `python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py --check-file docs/task-decomposition/2026-05-16_v3_phase1/tickets-group-d-drift.json` for entry T-V3-D-10.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/audit-md-check.sh T-V3-D-10`.
